overview.description: Repeat S3 test: execute storage upload and verify operation multiple times, validate operation result for each execution
overview.name: S3 Repeat scenario

repeat.comment: Repeat s3 storage operations with content verification for N number of times

s3.comment: Precondition - create testlum-repeat-bucket-one before repeat block

bucket.comment: Check ability to create testlum-repeat-bucket-one for repeat test

s3.comment: Execute upload_1.json storage operation within repeat

file.comment: Check ability to upload upload_1.json to testlum-repeat-bucket-one on each iteration

s3.comment: Execute file download on each repeat iteration to check content

file.comment: Verify file content matches expected file on each repeat iteration

s3.comment: Execute file download on each repeat iteration to check inline content

file.comment: Verify file content matches inline on each repeat iteration

s3.comment: Remove testlum-repeat-bucket-one to proceed next iteration
